name: Surfside Salmon Loaf
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (1 lb each) of drained, flaked salmon
1 1/2 cups of uncooked Quaker Oats (quick or old-fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
- For the salmon loaf, combine all ingredients thoroughly. Pack firmly into a greased 8-1/2" x 4-1/2" x 2-1/2" loaf pan.
- Bake in a preheated moderate oven (350°F) for about 1 hour and 15 minutes. Let stand 5 minutes before slicing.
- For the creamed peas, melt butter in a medium-sized saucepan. Stir in flour, salt, and pepper; blend well. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly until the mixture comes to a boil and thickens. Stir in peas and heat thoroughly. Serve hot over salmon loaf slices.
